meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Ship Fast
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate architecture, finish projects faster, and scale your output.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is 'architectural paralysis.' By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you standardize your boilerplate, enforce modularity, and offload complex logic to Claude Code. This system transforms chaotic development cycles into a predictable, automated pipeline, allowing you to ship production-ready SaaS apps in half the time.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the cursor blinking in a void—a testament to another project stalled by scope creep and decision fatigue. You’ve been here before: the initial excitement fades, replaced by the crushing weight of managing state, API integrations, and boilerplate code that never seems to end. Your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer is on the line.

But the best builders don't write more code; they orchestrate it. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move from manual craft to automated assembly. This isn't just about speed; it's about eliminating the friction that kills momentum. It is time to stop fighting your editor and start shipping.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your repository structure immediately. This step enforces strict directory separation and configuration defaults required for AI-agent compatibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure the folder structure is optimized for Claude Code agentic workflows.

steps.title: Define Business Logic via Schema
steps.description: Before writing a single line of feature code, define your data models. This ensures the AI understands the system constraints, preventing hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided business requirements and generate a schema.prisma file that enforces strict relations and indexing for a high-performance SaaS backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema from requirements.md'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Boilerplate
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD boilerplate. Use the template to map your schema directly to API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create API route handlers based on the schema.prisma file, implementing standard middleware for authentication and rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold api routes with auth middleware'

steps.title: Inject UI Components via Design Tokens
steps.description: Build the frontend by mapping your design system to the Antigravity UI library, ensuring consistency and speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library, following the specified design tokens for spacing, typography, and color palette.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build dashboard layout using design tokens'

steps.title: Final Integration and Test Suite
steps.description: Run the automated test suite to ensure the integration between your new features and the core template is flawless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive unit tests for the newly created services and run an end-to-end integration check against the base template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests and run build check'

pro_tips: Always lock your Claude Code context to a specific 'context.md' file to keep the agent aligned with your architectural decisions.
Use 'dry-run' flags on CLI commands to inspect the file diffs before applying changes to your production build.
Map your most frequent client requests to custom Antigravity snippets for zero-latency project kick-offs.
Leverage Claude Code's memory feature to store common bug fixes, preventing the agent from repeating previous mistakes.
Keep your 'antigravity.config.js' file lean; only include essential plugins to keep the AI's reasoning path clear and efficient.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, deploy to Vercel and run a performance audit to ensure your automated architecture meets production benchmarks.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects drain your revenue. By mastering the Antigravity template, you gain a repeatable, high-speed engine that impresses clients and maximizes your billable hours. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
